title: Better Mc Mods
description: This Mod Pack improves "vanilla" Minecraft. Improves Fps, Quality of life Features, Easy to Use. Only one click.
body:
# Better Mc Mods
## Why Better Mc Mods?
This is an **ModPack** that **improves** Minecraft **performace** and adds **quality** of life **features**. **Easy** to **use** and **install**! Have **fun** with **Minecraft**!
## How to install?
You can install any modpack using modrinth launcher. You can customize easily and there is no limit.
## Features?
1. Improves **Fps**!
2. Adds **World** and **Mini Map**!
3. **Easy** to see and **use**!
4. **Customizable**!
5. And much more!

## Included

## Extra Info
Have **Fun**!

**Support** Me by **Downloading** it!

Have issues or ideas **[join my Discord server](https://discord.com/invite/ETTr37p38R)**!
